additionalPlanContext: Upgrade this Maven WAR project to Java 21 while remaining fully on the javax.servlet stack. The application must still run using mvn jetty:run. Maintain Wicket 9.x and Jetty 9.4.x only (no Jakarta migration). Ensure zero jakarta.* references. Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to release 21. Upgrade Hibernate to a Java 21 compatible 5.x version. Upgrade MySQL connector to 8.x using com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver. Ensure jboss-logging is available at runtime. Replace removed JAXB modules using javax.xml.bind dependencies compatible with Java 21. Fix entity mappings if required. Add production-grade connection pooling using HikariCP with Hibernate 5.x. Configure Hibernate to use HikariCPConnectionProvider with reasonable pool settings. Fix Wicket Content Security Policy configuration so external stylesheets from self are allowed and browser does not block CSS with CSP. Ensure application builds successfully and WAR runs correctly.
